description: Add Groq as independent fallback provider with its own image/screen analysis pipeline (sendImageToGroqHttp), cross-provider fallback in both directions, and Ctrl+Alt+G keybinding to switch between Gemini and Groq mid-session
steps: 1. Added GROQ_MODELS array to storage.js with models: qwen/qwen3-32b, openai/gpt-oss-120b, openai/gpt-oss-20b, moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct, meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct, meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct
2. Added Groq model preferences to DEFAULT_PREFERENCES: groqModelExtraction, groqModelSolution, groqModelDebugging, forceGroqMode

3. Created sendImageToGroqHttp() in gemini.js — fully independent Groq vision pipeline using Groq's OpenAI-compatible chat completions API with image_url content type. Streams response, tracks usage, saves screen analysis.
4. Modified sendImageToGeminiHttp() to check forceGroqMode first (skip Gemini entirely), and fall back to sendImageToGroqHttp() when Gemini fails or has no keys.
5. Added cross-fallback in sendToGroq(): on failure, falls back to sendToGemma(). Added cross-fallback in sendToGemma(): on failure, falls back to sendToGroq().
6. Added fallback when Groq daily limits exhausted: calls sendToGemma() instead of just showing error.
7. Added forceGroqToggle keybinding (Ctrl+Alt+G on Windows, Cmd+Alt+G on Mac) in window.js getDefaultKeybinds().
8. Registered forceGroqToggle handler in updateGlobalShortcuts() — toggles forceGroqMode preference and sends 'force-groq-toggled' + status update to renderer.
9. Bumped KEYBINDS_VERSION to 6 to force keybind reset for new binding.
11. Updated generationComplete handler and send-text-message handler to respect forceGroqMode preference.
acceptance_criteria: Ctrl+Alt+G switches between Gemini and Groq mid-session, status bar shows which is active
When Gemini image analysis fails, automatically falls back to Groq
When Groq text response fails, automatically falls back to Gemini (and vice versa)
sendImageToGroqHttp works independently without any Gemini dependency
Groq daily limit exhaustion triggers Gemini fallback automatically
findings: Groq's vision API uses the same OpenAI chat completions format with image_url in content array. Models like qwen3-32b support multimodal input via this endpoint.
